ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters above sea level */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the station's location */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the station is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "slp" REAL /* Sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "stp" REAL /* Station pressure in hPa */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded on the date in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded on the date in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the recorded data */,
  "measurement_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement used for each data point */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Brief description of the weather conditions */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_attributes" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature attribute entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "temp_attributes" TEXT /* Attributes associated with the temperature measurement */,
  "temperature_type" TEXT /* Type of temperature measurement */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used for the temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_attributes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_attributes" (
  "prcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation attribute entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "prcp_attributes" TEXT /* Attributes associated with the precipitation measurement */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation measurement */,
  "precipitation_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used for the precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prcp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_attributes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "assigned_stations" TEXT /* IDs of the weather stations assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_assigned_stations FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_stations") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data used for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team involved in the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or research study */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project or research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
